LightningComponentBundle.description: Site footer: Designed & Built credit linking to the repo, GitHub star/fork counts that count up on reveal, and mobile social links.

property.name: repoPath
property.label: GitHub Repo Path
property.description: owner/repo used for the credit link and live star/fork counts. Leave blank to hide the stats.

property.name: fallbackStars
property.label: Fallback Stars
property.description: Star count shown when the GitHub API can't be reached.

property.name: fallbackForks
property.label: Fallback Forks
property.description: Fork count shown when the GitHub API can't be reached.
